hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' && (cd /Users/guillaume.elhadi/Developer/pdf_pptx_merger/src-tauri && cargo check 2>&1 | tail -20); } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && (cd /Users/guillaume.elhadi/Developer/pdf_pptx_merger && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20); } 2>/dev/null || true
